overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a presence on Mastodon, LinkedIn, and Bluesky, with a total follower count of 3580. His content focuses primarily on research in computational social science, disinformation, and information operations. Engagement varies across platforms, with LinkedIn showing the highest levels of interaction.

contentThemes.description: Posts related to research findings, methodologies, and publications in computational social science.
Content focused on the study and detection of disinformation and coordinated inauthentic behavior online.
Posts announcing new grants, hiring opportunities, and team accomplishments.

recommendations: Diversify content formats to include more visuals (images, videos) to potentially increase engagement.
Actively participate in relevant conversations and engage with followers to foster a stronger community presence.
Tailor content to each platform's specific audience and expectations (e.g., more formal content on LinkedIn, more informal on Bluesky).

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky shows a consistent level of engagement with research publications and conference announcements. The audience seems receptive to PhD research opportunities.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon engagement is relatively lower compared to other platforms. Focusing on initiating discussions and sharing more visual content might improve interaction.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn demonstrates the highest engagement, particularly with posts related to grants and job opportunities. Continue to leverage LinkedIn for professional announcements and networking.

topPerformingContent.content: Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.

Now hiring: Two postdoctoral researchers to join our team working on computational methods for social media analysis. Background in data science, computational social science, or related fields preferred.
Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
